# Dominion Digital

> Dominion Digital is a Kansas City digital marketing agency built around one metric: qualified leads. We combine traditional SEO, GEO (AI search optimization), paid ads, and automation under one roof. Results or you don't pay.

## Services
- [Web Design](/web-design): Custom websites built to convert — not just look good
- [Internet Marketing / SEO + GEO](/internet-marketing): Traditional Google rankings and AI search citations simultaneously via The Authority Stack
- [Advertising](/advertising): Paid search and social campaigns with full transparency
- [AI Automation](/ai-automation): Automations that follow up, qualify, and close leads while you sleep

## Service Areas
- [Kansas City, MO](/kansas-city-mo): Primary market
- [Overland Park, KS](/overland-park-ks)
- [Lenexa, KS](/lenexa-ks)
- [Olathe, KS](/olathe-ks)
- [Shawnee, KS](/shawnee-ks)
- [Lee's Summit, MO](/lees-summit-mo)
- [Independence, MO](/independence-mo)
- [Blue Springs, MO](/blue-springs-mo)
- [Raytown, MO](/raytown-mo)
- [Gladstone, MO](/gladstone-mo)
- [Liberty, MO](/liberty-mo)
- [Belton, MO](/belton-mo)
- [Raymore, MO](/raymore-mo)

- [About](/about): Cody's background, the agency story, and why we built Dominion differently

## Contact
- [Contact](/contact): Get a free audit or consultation

## Proprietary Method
The Authority Stack is Dominion's combined SEO + GEO system — the only Kansas City agency running traditional Google optimization and AI search citation simultaneously.

## Guarantees
- Site Guarantee: Money back before launch + 30-day free fixes after
- Results Guarantee: More qualified leads in 90 days or we work free for up to 90 more days
